prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is M-201 Shaft alignment within 2.7 Equipment & Machinery. The relevant subcategory is 2.7.2 Alignment. The observed field condition is: thermal growth offset ignored on hot service. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors API 686, laser system manuals.
title: T5 M-201 Fault diagnosis
